title: EPS Tech confidential source code ( military ) ransomware incident

victim.name: EPS Tech confidential source code ( military )

extortion.description: 10GB EPS Tech confidential source code PoC Handala has about 800 GB of the source code of sensitive Zionist military systems. Handala and resistance groups are present even in your most secret military systems! You can’t even think about it! We are waiting for the immediate announcement of Aman to update the Systems! More surprises…
